HomePage.title: Welcome to Sr. Almeida Hostel
HomePage.description: Your safe harbor in Santa Teresa, Rio de Janeiro.

location.title: Privileged Location
location.description: In the heart of Santa Teresa, close to Rio's best bars and cultural spots.

community.title: Vibrant Community
community.description: Meet people from all over the world in our common areas and social events.

security.title: 24h Security
security.description: Your peace of mind is our priority, with constant reception and monitoring.

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.description: We offer three types of accommodations to meet your needs, from private rooms to shared dormitories.

footer.title: Ready for your stay?
footer.description: Before booking, make sure to read our rules and cancellation policies for a harmonious stay.

Footer.description: Your safe harbor in Santa Teresa, Rio de Janeiro. Comfort, community and culture in one place.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Sr. Almeida Hostel. All rights reserved. Developed by XPTOTec.

guests.label: People
guests.pcd: Is there anyone with disabilities in the group?
guests.elevatorWarning: Warning: The hostel does not have an elevator (access only by stairs).

results.title: Available Beds
results.noResults: No beds available for the selected dates.

select.title: Identify Guests
select.name: Full Name
select.validationError: Please fill in all companion details.

confirm.title: Confirm Reservation
confirm.termsAccept: I have read and accept the Terms of Use
confirm.errorDefault: An error occurred while creating the reservation.

success.title: Reservation Confirmed!
success.message: Your reservation has been successfully completed.

tariffs.title: Tariff Management
tariffs.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this tariff?

settings.title: System Settings
settings.maxFeeHint: Charged for same-day or no-show cancellations.

reservations.title: My Reservations
reservations.finalWarning: This action is irreversible. The value will be refunded to your card according to the policy.

RoomsPage.title: Our Rooms and Beds
RoomsPage.description: Discover our accommodations in Santa Teresa.

checkInOut.title: Check-in and Check-out
checkInOut.content: Check-in starts at 12:00 PM. Check-out must be completed by 12:00 PM. Late check-out is subject to availability and additional fees.

commonAreas.title: Common Areas
commonAreas.content: Use of the community kitchen and laundry is allowed from 07:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Please keep the spaces clean after use.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.content: Free cancellation up to 5 days before check-in. Between 1 and 4 days, an administrative fee applies. Same-day cancellations or no-shows are non-refundable.

prohibitions.title: Prohibitions
prohibitions.content: Pets are not allowed (except guide dogs). Alcohol consumption is prohibited in all common areas (allowed only in the annexed restaurant). Smoking is allowed only in designated areas.

noElevator.title: Accessibility
noElevator.content: Note: The building is historic and does not have an elevator. Access to rooms is exclusively by stairs.

lockers.title: Lockers and Responsibility
lockers.content: Each guest has an individual locker with a key. The hostel is not responsible for items left outside the lockers. We offer optional insurance for valuable belongings.

silence.title: Silence Policy
silence.content: Please respect the rest of other guests. Absolute silence hours are from 10:00 PM to 08:00 AM.

ac.title: Air Conditioning
ac.description: All our rooms are equipped with air conditioning for your comfort.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.description: Included in the daily rate, served in the annexed outsourced refectory.

kitchen.title: Community Kitchen
kitchen.description: Fully equipped for you to prepare your own meals.

lavanderia.title: Laundry
lavanderia.description: Washing and drying machines available for guest use.

linen.title: Bed Kit
linen.description: Clean bed linens included. Free renewal every 7 days of stay.

towels.title: Towels
towels.description: Bath towels available for all guests.

lockers.title: Individual Lockers
lockers.description: Lockers with keys to store your belongings safely.

reception.title: 24h Reception
reception.description: Our team is available 24 hours a day for your safety and support.

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Limited rotating spaces subject to availability (no guarantee of space).

FeedbackPage.title: Guest Reviews

form.hint: Go to "My Reservations" to review completed stays.
form.loginRequired: You must be logged in and have a completed stay to review.
form.success: Your review has been submitted and is awaiting moderation.

FeedbackPage.noReviews: There are no approved reviews yet.

ContactPage.title: Contact and Groups
ContactPage.description: Questions or reservations for large groups? Get in touch with us.

negotiation.title: Group Negotiation
negotiation.content: We offer special conditions for reservations of entire rooms or the complete hostel. Contact us for a personalized quote.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Message sent successfully! We will contact you soon.

info.title: Contact Information
info.address: Paschoal Carlos Magno Street, Santa Teresa, Rio de Janeiro - RJ
